reasoning: Anthropic recently released Claude 3.7 Sonnet on February 24, 2025. It is extremely rare to jump a full major version number (i.e., from 3 to 4) within just four months of a significant minor release (3.7), especially when the 'Opus' model for the 3.5 or 3.7 generation has yet to be released. Recent community leaks from mid-May 2025 indicate that users are expecting an Anthropic release 'in the coming weeks,' but they refer to models like 'Claude 3.7 Opus' or a new code-named model ('Claude-Neptune'), rather than Claude 4. Furthermore, CEO Dario Amodei noted in March 2025 that they are 'reserving Claude 4 Sonnet' for significant leaps. While he teased that stronger models are coming in a 'relatively small number of time units,' the lack of definitive leaks pointing to 'Claude 4' launching within the next six weeks strongly suggests they will finish the 3.X rollout before moving to 4. Therefore, the likelihood of a Claude 4 public release before July 1, 2025 is very low.
